name: JAK inhibition alleviates the cellular senescence-associated secretory phenotype and frailty in old age
short_name: JAK inhibition SASP and aged-mouse frailty
summary: A PNAS study testing JAK-pathway suppression of SASP in senescent human cells and effects of JAK inhibition on inflammation and physical function in aged mice.
venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
